examples: The kitchen was dank and cheerless.
Looking up at her friend, she was struck by his sad and cheerless face.
The poor child got more cheerless every day, and looked so thin and pale that Sebastian became worried.

Given its subject matter, "Girlfight" could have been exploitive, or a cheerless feminist tract.
